seo_title: EmoDistill: Offline Emotion Skill Distillation for Language Model…
meta_description: Discover how EmoDistill improves language model agents' negotiation skills and outperforms vanilla SLM/LLM baselines.
body_html:
EmoDistill improves language model agents' negotiation skills by distilling emotional strategy into emotion selection and expression.

Key ComponentsImplicit Q-Learning (IQL) selector learns which emotion to expressLow-Rank Adaptation (LoRA)-based policy learns how to express emotions through Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Judge Policy Optimization (JPO)Performance BenefitsNegotiation DomainUtility AchievedFour Emotion-Sensitive DomainsHighest Utility AchievedVanilla SLM/LLM BaselinesOvershadowed by EmoDistillIQL-Only Emotion SelectionOutperformed by EmoDistillTransfer StudiesEmoDistill generalizes across domains, unseen counterparties, and trained-vs-trained tournaments.

source.title: EmoDistill: Offline Emotion Skill Distillation for Language Model Agents in Adversarial Negotiation
source.summary: Researchers have developed a new framework called EmoDistill to help language model agents navigate adversarial negotiations more effectively. The framework uses two components: an Implicit Q-Learning selector that chooses which emotion to express and a Low-Rank Adaptation policy that learns how to express the chosen emotion through fine-tuning and optimization. This approach has been shown to outperform existing baselines in four high-stakes negotiation domains, demonstrating its potential for improving agent performance in emotionally charged negotiations. EmoDistill achieves this without requiring online interactions during training.
